mapper.select: SELECT b.BID_SN AS bidSn, b.AUC_SN AS aucSn, p.PRD_SN AS prdSn, p.PRD_NM AS auctionTitle, thumb.THUMBNAIL_PATH AS thumbnailPath, b.BID_AMT AS bidAmount, a.AUC_CUR_AMT AS currentPrice, b.BID_STATUS_CD AS bidStatusCode, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, b.BID_REG_DT AS bidDateTime, a.AUC_END_DT AS auctionEndDateTime, u.USR_SN AS sellerSn, u.USR_NM AS sellerName FROM BID b JOIN AUCTION a ON a.AUC_SN = b.AUC_SN JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN = p.USR_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pi.PRD_SN, CONCAT(f.FL_PATH, '/', f.FL_SAVE_NM) AS THUMBNAIL_PATH FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE pi JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN AND f.FL_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN ( SELECT PRD_SN, MIN(CASE WHEN PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 100000 + PRD_IMG_SORT_NO) AS SORT_KEY FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE GROUP BY PRD_SN ) picked ON picked.PRD_SN = pi.PRD_SN AND picked.SORT_KEY = CASE WHEN pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 100000 + pi.PRD_IMG_SORT_NO ) thumb ON thumb.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN WHERE b.USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY b.BID_REG_DT DESC, b.BID_SN DESC
